arterial_bypass.label: Arterial bypass
arterial_bypass.description: Router hops to larger roads with grade separation, roundabouts, or cycle highways to avoid signalised junctions, barriers, or calming furniture.
integration_test_checks: If signal_weight or junction_weight aggressive and accidents spike vs fastest, check for arterial geometry on map
Putney toxic snap @0.6 signal — accidents +94% with illumination drop
arterial_bypass.preset_guidance: Bundle with risk_weight >= 0.5; cap signal if risk < 0.4. Night: add light_weight >= 0.4.

rat_run.label: Residential rat run
rat_run.description: Router threads residential side streets with dense traffic-calming furniture to avoid signals, motor stress, or junction clusters.
integration_test_checks: Check calming_count on map when signal or speed aggressive — Bromley 55→265 @signal 2.0
Wembley calming +411% on tfl_live reroute
rat_run.preset_guidance: Cap signal_weight at 0.4 if calming_weight > 0 (Comfort Flow). Do not max signal without calming counter.

valley_trap.label: Valley trap
valley_trap.description: Aggressive hill avoidance routes through long flat arterial corridors at valley floor, trading climb for distance and exposure.
integration_test_checks: Hill @3.0 — verify accidents not spiking >40% vs baseline on Greenwich/Bromley/Wembley
Wembley +4.9 km @5.0 rejected — never expose beyond cap 3.0
valley_trap.preset_guidance: Counter-balance with risk_weight and speed_weight in profile; hill slider guarantees flattest plateau, not holistic safety.

scenic_park_detour.label: Scenic park detour
scenic_park_detour.description: Router pulls through parks, rivers, or green corridors — often unpaved or unlit — to satisfy green or risk objectives.
integration_test_checks: Putney @risk 0.8 — rough 27% and illumination 58% on safe path
Green @0.2 Twickenham — barrier_count 0→8
scenic_park_detour.preset_guidance: Explorer preset may accept; Commuter needs surface_weight floor for road bikes.

paved_only_tension.label: Paved-only tension
paved_only_tension.description: Smooth-surface preference forces routing off park gravel and onto paved arterials or residential streets.
integration_test_checks: Surface ON — verify green_pct drop on Tottenham/Hill
Tottenham accidents +28% on paved detour
paved_only_tension.preset_guidance: Road bike hardware override sets surface_weight floor; conflicts with Explorer green preference.

live_closure_reroute.label: Live closure reroute
live_closure_reroute.description: Live TfL/TomTom disruption avoidance forces long residential or rough-surface bypasses around closures.
integration_test_checks: tfl_live @0.2 Wembley — +1.76 km and +411% calming
Never expose multipliers above 0.2 — Spitalfields disruption doubles @1.0
live_closure_reroute.preset_guidance: Binary toggle only at 0.2; pair with risk_weight for Kings Cross accident spike.

barrier_avoidance_detour.label: Barrier avoidance detour
barrier_avoidance_detour.description: Dodging gates and bollards routes onto longer paths with different stress profiles.
integration_test_checks: Greenwich accidents +53% @barrier 0.6
Reject @2.0+ — Greenwich accidents +129%
barrier_avoidance_detour.preset_guidance: Pair with risk_weight at aggressive; cap at 1.5.

segregated_infrastructure_pull.label: Segregated infrastructure pull
segregated_infrastructure_pull.description: Reward for cycleways, quietways, or car-free corridors pulls route onto TfL CS networks or segregated paths.
integration_test_checks: vehicular_free Battersea tfl_cycleway 5.4%→73.8% @2.0
Twickenham speed_stress −96% @vehicular_free 3.0
segregated_infrastructure_pull.preset_guidance: Natural pair vehicular_free + tfl_cycleway; watch Tottenham/Bromley accident side-effects.

pedestrian_shortcut.label: Pedestrian shortcut
pedestrian_shortcut.description: High signal penalty causes micro-detours onto footway/path segments to bypass traffic lights — geographically stupid zig-zags.
integration_test_checks: Phase 1 note: pedestrian M bump mitigates but small sections north of Imperial may persist @signal 2.0
Check for footway/path stubs on Folium maps at aggressive signal
pedestrian_shortcut.preset_guidance: Cap signal at 2.0 globally; ensure junction_weight anchors zig-zag cost.

lit_arterial_corridor.label: Lit arterial corridor
lit_arterial_corridor.description: Well-lit routing preference pulls onto busier, lit motor corridors at the expense of safety and green.
integration_test_checks: Light ON — Tottenham accidents +44%, Greenwich +55%
Night Ride Mode: light + risk both >= 0.4
lit_arterial_corridor.preset_guidance: Night Ride bundle: light_weight + risk_weight >= 0.4. Never high light with low risk.

quietway_only_detour.label: Quietway-only detour
quietway_only_detour.description: Standalone quietway reward causes long detours on the few corridors where quietway tags exist — 82% of routes inert.
integration_test_checks: Do not ship standalone quietway UI — merge into cycleway toggle
Bromley +526 m @quietway 0.2 only

distance_wall.label: Distance wall
distance_wall.description: Toxic detour beyond product cap — marginal target-metric gain for disproportionate distance or duration cost.
integration_test_checks: Any route Δkm >= +1.5 km or Δmin >= +6 min at shipped multiplier — flag in distance_explosion_routes
Hill Wembley +4.9 km @5.0 rejected; vehicular_free Bromley +4.8 km @5.0 rejected
distance_wall.preset_guidance: Hard caps per weight in ui.cap — never expose rejected 5.0 multipliers in default UI.

inert_weight.label: Inert weight
inert_weight.description: Weight produces zero path change across entire test set — slider is meaningless.
integration_test_checks: width_weight: all 11 routes byte-identical 0.0→5.0
Re-sweep gate: >=3/11 routes with >=10% narrow_km drop before UI work
inert_weight.preset_guidance: Backend width_weight = 0.0 always; hidden from UI.
